message:
Fix process-transcript.ts to handle Claude's content block format

The script now correctly handles:
- Content as array of blocks (Claude format: [{type: "text", text: "..."}, ...])
- Tool calls embedded in content array ({type: "tool_use", name: "...", input: {...}})

Previously, when content was an array, it would be coerced to "[object Object]"
giving wrong token estimates. Tool calls embedded in content arrays were also
missed, resulting in incomplete stats.

Added helper functions:
- extractTextContent(): Handles both string and array content formats
- processToolCall(): Extracted to avoid code duplication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
